2026/05/26 21:27:53.169550659 "default"))

2026/05/26 21:27:53.169691553 }

2026/05/26 21:27:58.274958654 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/26 21:27:58.274965046 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/26 21:27:58.274992827 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/26 21:27:58.274994040 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275015089 {
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275016091 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275030027 new <- list()
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275030959 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275045566 new$width <- width
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275046348 if (!missing(height))

2026/05/26 21:27:58.275093997 new$title <- title
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275095169 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275110338 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275111139 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275127099 new$version <- version
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275129513 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275148990 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275149992 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275163717 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275164599 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275177793 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275178575 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275191118 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275193613 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275210194 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275211106 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275236180 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275246369 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275263825 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275264887 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275279304 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275280165 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275294332 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275295083 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275309540 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275310362 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275328796 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275329668 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275346489 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275347361 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275366848 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275367699 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275383509 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275384360 "default"))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275440205 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275441688 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275455124 }
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275457328 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275478768 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275479930 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275496892 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275497753 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275514695 }
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275515537 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275529523 }
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275530334 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275544641 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275545513 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275561793 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275562895 domain = NA)
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275579186 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275580147 }
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275594574 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275595366 old$family <- family
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275612138 }
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275613019 version <- old$version
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275629720 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",

2026/05/26 21:27:58.275694251 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/05/26 21:27:58.275733966 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275750627 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275751499 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275770744 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275771676 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275796873 invisible()

2026/05/26 21:27:58.275015089 {

2026/05/26 21:27:58.275148990 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275149992 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275163717 new$encoding <- encoding

2026/05/26 21:27:58.275193613 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275210194 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275211106 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/05/26 21:27:58.275310362 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275328796 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275329668 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275346489 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275347361 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/26 21:27:58.275384360 "default"))
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275440205 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/26 21:27:58.275441688 family <- family$metrics

2026/05/26 21:27:58.275457328 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")

2026/05/26 21:27:58.275529523 }
